data.body: REBASED stack onto origin/main (was 12 behind at ee49b4a89 -> now on 4262e3794). Clean rebase, no conflicts. Post-rebase: opcert+trusted_env suites 21/21 pass, lint+typecheck clean. Re-pushed -> changes 649 (368c) + 650 (42d1) updated with new patchsets on current main (Verified re-runs; LLM-Review carries across trivial rebase). Note: new origin/main includes disabled-absurd-iggypops (verify-identity introducing-commit resolution) — adjacent to opcert era logic but no conflict/breakage. Branch epic/opcert-sonic now current for FFO submit.
